description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow complex set within a walled property, featuring multiple interconnected structures with light beige facades and white trim. The main building is two stories tall, with a prominent central entrance, symmetrical window placement, and a circular driveway with parked cars. The grounds include manicured lawns, a swimming pool, a garden area with hedges and trees, and a separate garage or utility building. The property is surrounded by a white perimeter wall, with a main gate and lush landscaping along the front. The rooflines are primarily gabled, with some hip and flat sections, and the overall design is spacious and upscale, suitable for a suburban or affluent urban neighborhood.
description: A large, modern two-story bungalow complex with beige facades, white trim, gabled roofs, a circular driveway, pool, and landscaped grounds within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway, parked cars, and lush landscaping along the front wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the main building, garage area, and dense greenery along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard lawn, swimming pool, and garden area with hedges and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary building, garden, and additional landscaping, with the pool area visible to the left.
attribute_roof_type: gable with hip and flat sections
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
